dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 13, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**Yankees Fall to Orioles as Bradish Dominates**

Kyle Bradish tossed a 6-inning shutout, striking out 7 and walking 3, as the Baltimore Orioles cruised to a 7-0 win over the New York Yankees. Adley Rutschman led the Orioles offense, going 3-for-3 with a home run and 3 RBI. Pete Alonso and Coby Mayo also had strong games for Baltimore.

**Guardians Outlast Angels in 4-2 Victory**

Parker Messick pitched 6.2 innings, striking out 7 and allowing 2 runs, as the Cleveland Guardians edged the Los Angeles Angels 4-2. Zach Neto went 2-for-3 with a home run and 2 RBI for the Angels, while Chase DeLauter and Angel Martínez also had strong performances.

**Nationals Come from Behind to Beat Reds**

The Washington Nationals came out on top 8-7 over the Cincinnati Reds, thanks in part to a 4-RBI performance from Tyler Stephenson, who homered and doubled. Gus Varland earned the win in relief, while Mitchell Parker pitched a scoreless 3rd inning.

**Rockies Blast Pirates 10-4**

Mickey Moniak went 5-for-5 with a home run and 5 RBI, leading the Colorado Rockies to a 10-4 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates. TJ Rumfield and Ryan O'Hearn also had strong games for Colorado.

**Red Sox Shut Down Phillies 3-1**

Sonny Gray pitched 6 strong innings, striking out 6 and allowing 1 run, as the Boston Red Sox defeated the Philadelphia Phillies 3-1. Ceddanne Rafaela homered and drove in 2 runs for the Red Sox.

**Blue Jays Edge Rays 5-3**

Daulton Varsho went 4-for-4 with a grand slam and 4 RBI, leading the Toronto Blue Jays to a 5-3 win over the Tampa Bay Rays. Dylan Cease pitched 7 strong innings, striking out 9 and allowing 1 run, for the Rays.

**Mets Take Down Tigers 3-2**

Framber Valdez pitched 6.2 innings, striking out 7 and allowing 2 runs, as the New York Mets edged the Detroit Tigers 3-2. Riley Greene went 3-for-5 with 2 RBI for the Tigers.

**Braves Shut Down Cubs 4-1**

Shota Imanaga pitched 7 strong innings, striking out 6 and allowing 2 runs, as the Atlanta Braves defeated the Chicago Cubs 4-1. Mauricio Dubón homered and drove in 2 runs for the Braves.

**White Sox Outlast Royals 6-5**

Tyler Davis earned the win in relief, as the Chicago White Sox edged the Kansas City Royals 6-5. Colson Montgomery went 3-for-4 with a home run and 1 RBI for the Royals.

**Marlins Cruise Past Twins 9-5**

Max Meyer pitched 5.2 innings, striking out 9 and allowing 4 runs, as the Miami Marlins defeated the Minnesota Twins 9-5. Byron Buxton homered twice and drove in 2 runs for the Twins.

**Padres Shut Down Brewers 3-1**

Jacob Misiorowski pitched 7 strong innings, striking out 10 and allowing 0 runs, as the San Diego Padres defeated the Milwaukee Brewers 3-1. Gavin Sheets homered and drove in 3 runs for the Padres.

**Rangers Edge Diamondbacks 6-5**

Cal Quantrill earned the win in relief, as the Texas Rangers edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 6-5. Jake Burger homered and drove in 4 runs for the Rangers.

**Astros Edge Mariners 4-3**

Bryan Abreu earned the win in relief, as the Houston Astros edged the Seattle Mariners 4-3. J.P. Crawford homered and drove in 1 run for the Mariners.

**Athletics Shut Down Cardinals 6-2**

J.T. Ginn pitched 6 strong innings, striking out 3 and allowing 0 runs, as the Oakland Athletics defeated the St. Louis Cardinals 6-2. Nick Kurtz homered and drove in 4 runs for the Athletics.

**Dodgers Shut Down Giants 4-0**

Shohei Ohtani pitched 7 strong innings, striking out 8 and allowing 0 runs, as the Los Angeles Dodgers defeated the San Francisco Giants 4-0.
